creator: rock_on_the_web@hotmail.com
text:
This may just be these two ports, but there maybe others.
make install clean from ports ok, but on run get a seg fault message:
Segmentation fault: 11 (core dumped)

Ran on an old i386 box that needs updating from 6.2, but from the error it really does appear to be a 64 thing. Gondola still didn't work here either, but the error changed to python errors.
